summary: Iteration 47: Tested AI Website Builder extended features - email collection, hosting options, admin panel, and ZIP download. All backend APIs working (21/22 tests passed). Frontend UI verified: input form with email field, publish modal with Host/Download options, admin panel with stats and settings.
passed_tests: GET /api/ai-builder/settings - returns configuration with prices and URLs
POST /api/ai-builder/generate - requires customer_email field
POST /api/ai-builder/generate - validates email format
POST /api/ai-builder/generate - creates website with valid email and registers user
POST /api/ai-builder/website/{id}/submit-domain - accepts valid domain
POST /api/ai-builder/website/{id}/submit-domain - rejects invalid domain format
POST /api/ai-builder/website/{id}/select-hosting - selects WaaS plan
POST /api/ai-builder/website/{id}/select-hosting - selects e-WaaS plan
POST /api/ai-builder/website/{id}/select-hosting - selects download option
POST /api/ai-builder/website/{id}/select-hosting - rejects invalid hosting type
POST /api/ai-builder/website/{id}/confirm-payment - confirms payment
GET /api/ai-builder/website/{id}/download - returns valid ZIP file
ZIP contains 5 HTML pages (index, about, services, blog, contact)
ZIP contains CSS with butterfly animation
ZIP contains Diocreations branding badge in footer
ZIP contains README with deployment instructions
GET /api/ai-builder/admin/stats - returns website statistics
GET /api/ai-builder/admin/websites - returns websites list with pagination
GET /api/ai-builder/admin/settings - returns admin settings
PUT /api/ai-builder/admin/settings - updates settings successfully
DELETE /api/ai-builder/admin/website/{id} - returns 404 for invalid ID
UI: Input form shows email field as first required field
UI: Generate button triggers AI generation with loading state
UI: Preview shows generated website with hero image
UI: Publish modal shows Host with Diocreations option
UI: Publish modal shows Download option with pricing
UI: Host flow shows domain registration step
UI: Admin panel shows stats cards (Total, Preview, Deployed, Downloaded, Pending)
UI: Admin panel shows websites table with customer email and status
UI: Admin Settings tab shows all configurable fields
skipped_tests: DELETE /api/ai-builder/admin/website/{id} - skipped due to generation timeout
critical_code_review_comments: Email collection working - customer_email is required and validated
User registration in public_users collection on website generation
Hosting flow properly updates hosting_status through stages
ZIP export includes all 5 pages, CSS, JS, images, and README
Diocreations branding badge with animated butterfly in footer
Admin panel properly displays stats and allows settings configuration
Stripe payment links are configurable but not yet set up (admin can add them)
seed_data_creation: Created test websites: TEST_Email_Collection_Biz, TEST_Hosting_Flow_Biz, TEST_Download_Biz, Playwright Test Cafe
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 verified the extended AI Website Builder features. Email collection is required for generation. Hosting flow has multiple steps: choice → domain → plan → dns (for hosting) OR choice → download (for self-hosting). Admin panel at /admin/ai-websites shows stats and settings. ZIP download includes multi-page static HTML with Diocreations branding badge and animated butterfly. Stripe payment links are configurable in admin settings but not yet set up.

mocked_apis.note: Stripe payment links are configurable but not yet set up - admin can add them in settings. Image generation via Gemini Nano Banana is real.
